name: Town Crier
description: The settlement's official voice. Stands at the crossroads and shouts the news, decrees, and warnings. In a world without newspapers, this is the media.
dialogue_hooks: bellowing the day's news as you arrive in town
offering to announce your arrival — for a small fee
whispering something different from what they just shouted
asking if you have news from the road worth announcing
voice_patterns: booming orator — projects from the diaphragm
dramatic performer — every announcement is theater
dry wit — delivers absurd news with a straight face
nervous official — reads what they're told, questions nothing aloud

schedule.morning: receiving the day's announcements from authorities
schedule.afternoon: crying the news at designated spots
schedule.night: at the tavern, hearing tomorrow's gossip
